subject: FW: quick question
body:
From: Laura Abbott [mailto:laura.abbott@gmail.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, January 23, 2008 1:56 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Re: quick question

 

Wow, thank you! Please send him my many thanks. I really wasn't
expecting that, but I'm incredibly grateful. 
Best,
Laura

On Jan 23, 2008 9:42 AM, Lesley Groff < lesley@nysgllc.com
<mailto:lesley@nysgllc.com> > wrote:

Ok Laura!  Spoke to Jeffrey and he said he will pay for next year too!!
J

 

From: Laura Abbott [mailto:laura.abbott@gmail.com] 
Sent: Thursday, January 17, 2008 10:55 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: quick question

 

Sorry, Lesley, but I just wanted to make sure that the scholarship from
Jeffrey was just for my first year of medical school. I got a reminder
today to apply for Financial Aid for next year, so I thought it worth
checking before I begin filling out those forms. I couldn't be more
grateful for all that Jeffrey's given me thus far, so I am not asking
for more, honestly. 
Thank you,
Laura

From: Laura Abbott [mailto:laura.abbott@gmail.com]

Subject: Re: quick question

 

Wow, thank you! Please send him my many thanks. I really wasn't expecting that, but I'm incredibly grateful.
Best,

On Jan 23, 2008 9:42 AM, Lesley Groff < lesley@nysgllc.com> wrote:

Ok Laura!  Spoke to Jeffrey and he said he will pay for next year too!!  J

 

From: Laura Abbott [mailto:laura.abbott@gmail.com]
Sent: Thursday, January 17, 2008 10:55 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: quick question

 

Sorry, Lesley, but I just wanted to make sure that the scholarship from Jeffrey was just for my first year of medical school. I got a reminder today to apply for Financial Aid for next year, so I thought it worth checking before I begin filling out those forms. I couldn't be more grateful for all that Jeffrey's given me thus far, so I am not asking for more, honestly.
Thank you,
Laura
